title: Villager’s Windmill
description: Adds a Villager Windmill structure to plains biomes
body:
This mod adds a Villager Windmill to the game, featuring mostly farmer villagers inside the new structure.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ede4c9980d9cdbc4cba62404a4570e4e6e39f5bb.jpeg)

You’ll also find plenty of hay bales throughout the Windmill—maybe even a few hidden loot chests!

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d8f6d243b16e442a7694af8fad2cc927088c696.jpeg)

The Villager Windmill can spawn in Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
